general_notes: No Ratio / No DTI asset-based Jumbo program — in-house underwriting up to $3M (higher by exception).
No income documentation required. No income on 1003. Employment info only. Qualification based on assets (DTA for primary/2nd home, DSCR for investment).
Max LTV 60% for all transaction types and occupancy types.
Accepts all visa types (F1, B1/B2, J1, EAD, etc.) and foreign nationals with no additional price hit.
100% gift funds allowed for primary, 2nd home, AND investment purchase (max 3 donors, no exceptions). Gift funds cannot be used as reserves.
Gift of equity allowed for all occupancy types (purchase only).
No financed property limit. No cash-out seasoning requirement. Allow transferred appraisal.
Equity in REO can be used as non-liquid reserve.
Available in select counties in CA, NV, WA, TX, GA, MA, NY — 7 states.
TX restrictions: No primary cash-out or rate/term refi. 2nd home and investment OK. Per TX SB 17: will not lend to foreign nationals and NPRA from China in TX.
FICO below 680 requires management approval with compensating factors (lower LTV + more reserves).
Borrowers from OFAC/high-risk countries (Exhibit A) are ineligible unless US citizen or green card holder.
Prohibited/high-risk employment per Exhibit B and C. No massage parlor employment — hard stop.

location_restrictions: TX: no primary cash-out or rate/term refi; 2nd home and investment OK
TX SB 17: will not lend to foreign national and NPRA from China in TX

additional_rules.description: No Ratio / No DTI Jumbo — asset-based qualification using DTA (Debts to Assets) ratio. In-house underwriting.
additional_rules.qualification_path: DTA: Total Debts / Total Assets <= 60%. No income documentation needed — employment info only on 1003.
additional_rules.income_doc: None required. No income on 1003. Need LOE on source of wealth if borrower not currently employed.
additional_rules.reserves_fico_700_plus: 12 months PITIA (min 6 months liquid, remaining may be non-liquid)
additional_rules.reserves_fico_below_700: 18 months PITIA (min 12 months liquid, remaining may be non-liquid)
additional_rules.fico_below_680: Requires management approval with compensating factors (lower LTV + more reserves)
additional_rules.credit_profile: Allow 1 mortgage late in 12 months (1x30x12). Installment/revolving: 3x30x12, 2x60x12, 1x90x12. Over 90 days late ineligible. Foreclosure/bankruptcy: 1 year seasoning.
additional_rules.gift_funds: 100% gift funds allowed for all occupancy types (purchase). Max 3 donors — no exceptions. Gift funds cannot be used as reserves. Gift of equity allowed for all occupancy types.
additional_rules.foreign_nationals: All visa types accepted (F1, B1/B2, J1, EAD) with no price hit. Foreign nationals OK. Must not be from OFAC/high-risk countries (Exhibit A).
additional_rules.cash_out_ltv: 60% max LTV for cash-out (same as purchase/R/T). No cash-out seasoning requirement.
additional_rules.delayed_financing: Within 60 days of closing — max 60% LTV for primary. Need to source purchase payment.
additional_rules.tx_restrictions: No primary cash-out or rate/term refi in TX. 2nd home and investment OK.
additional_rules.eligible_properties: SFR, 2-4 units, attached/detached PUD, warranted condo (detached and attached). Properties 10 acres or less.
additional_rules.non_liquid_reserves: Net equity of real estate (US & foreign), auto, boats, gold & silver bullion

location_restrictions: TX SB 17: will not lend to foreign national and NPRA from China in TX

additional_rules.description: Universe DSCR for investment properties — no DTA needed. DSCR can be no ratio.
additional_rules.qualification_path: DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio). No DTA needed for investment. DSCR can be no ratio.
additional_rules.dscr_below_1_2: DSCR < 1.2 (or no ratio): 12 months PITIA reserve (6 months liquid, 6 months non-liquid OK)
additional_rules.ltv_below_45: If LTV < 45%: DSCR >= 1 = no reserve needed; DSCR < 1 = 6 months reserve (3 months non-liquid can be from cash-out proceeds, need 3 months liquid)
additional_rules.fico_below_680: Requires management approval with compensating factors
additional_rules.credit_profile: Allow 1 mortgage late in 12 months (1x30x12). Installment/revolving: 3x30x12, 2x60x12, 1x90x12. Over 90 days late ineligible. Foreclosure/bankruptcy: 1 year seasoning.
additional_rules.gift_funds: 100% gift funds allowed for investment purchase. Max 3 donors. Gift funds cannot be used as reserves.
additional_rules.foreign_nationals: All visa types accepted with no price hit. Foreign nationals OK. Must not be from OFAC/high-risk countries.
additional_rules.cash_out_ltv: 60% max LTV. No cash-out seasoning. Cash-out purpose LOE required for business purpose (DSCR) loans.
additional_rules.rental_income_docs: Executed rental agreement + reasonability test (Zillow, Rent-O-Meter), OR realtor/broker estimated rental income, OR market rents via rent schedule on appraisal.
additional_rules.eligible_properties: SFR, 2-4 units, attached/detached PUD, warranted condo. Properties 10 acres or less.
additional_rules.non_liquid_reserves: Net equity of real estate (US & foreign), auto, boats, gold & silver bullion
additional_rules.vesting: Must vest in individual or trust — no business vesting for investment
